title: Summer storm-chasing & art nights
igCaption:
June in SWFL means dramatic summer skies, warm Gulf waters, and the local art & music scene coming alive after dark 🌩️🎨 While the snowbirds have flown north, true Florida summer lovers know this is the BEST time to explore — fewer crowds, golden-hour sunsets that hit different after an afternoon storm, and vibrant weekly outdoor markets and art walks lighting up Cape Coral and Fort Myers evenings. Skip the rideshare wait and cruise on YOUR schedule — from a waterfront gallery hop to a spontaneous sunset beach run. Book your rental on Turo and make this summer one for the books! 🚗✨

🚗 Rent your SWFL ride on Turo — link in bio.
